title: sideritis ocymastrum
intro: Sideritis ocymastrum, also known as mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a perennial plant species in the genus Sideritis, commonly found in the mountains of Greece. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. Sideritis ocymastrum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed in the form of dried leaves or essential oil.
